_comment: BARYCENTER — Default parameter ranges. Values are starting points, not final physics. All systems read from this file; no magic numbers in code.

planet._comment_radius: Simulation units. 1 unit ≈ 1 metre equivalent at character scale.

day._comment: Real-time minutes per full planet rotation. Range: 60–120.

binary._comment: Real-time minutes for secondary sun to complete one orbit relative to primary. Range: 10–30.
binary._comment_color: Primary is warm (K/G-type ~5000K implied), secondary is hotter/bluer.
binary._comment_mass_ratio: M2/M1 mass ratio. Determines barycenter split.

sun1._comment_ang: Apparent angular radius of primary sun disc (degrees).

sun2._comment_ang: Apparent angular radius of secondary sun disc (degrees).

astro._comment: Global time multiplier for AstroSystem (dev: increase to speed up cycles).
astro._comment_sep: Binary separation as a multiple of planet_radius_units.

ring._comment_tilt: Ring plane tilt relative to equatorial plane, degrees.

moon._comment_radius_mul: Moon radius as fraction of planet radius.

atmosphere._comment_dust: Baseline dust suspension (0–1). Storms push this higher.
atmosphere._comment_haze: Atmospheric scattering density (0–1). Controls depth-layer separation.
atmosphere._comment_scatter: RGB, normalised. Warm dusty atmosphere tint.

pixel._comment: Integer only. Frame rendered at 1/N resolution then upscaled. Range: 3–6.
pixel._comment_dither: 0 = no dither, 1 = full Bayer matrix amplitude.
pixel._comment_palette: Effective colour levels per channel after quantisation. Not a hard 8-bit lock.

lighting._comment: Discrete surface shading bands. 0 = smooth, 1–5 = stepped. Range: 0–5.
lighting._comment_elev: Primary sun elevation cap for default composition state.

climate._comment: Base wind speed in simulation units/s at sea level.
climate._comment_storm: Pressure differential (normalised 0–1) above which storm onset begins.
climate._comment_thermal: Climate field inertia. Higher = slower response to Insolation changes.
climate._comment_grid_w: Climate grid width (longitude axis). Lower than insolation for performance.
climate._comment_grid_h: Climate grid height (latitude axis). Recommended 2:1 aspect ratio.
climate._comment_dt: Target game-seconds per climate update tick.
climate._comment_temp_base: Baseline equatorial surface temperature in Kelvin.
climate._comment_temp_lat_k: Kelvin drop from equator to pole (T_base = T_equator - k * |lat_fraction|).
climate._comment_heat_gain: Heating rate coefficient (K/s per unit insolation).
climate._comment_heat_loss: Cooling rate coefficient (1/s); controls thermal inertia.
climate._comment_p_from_t: Pressure deviation per Kelvin departure from mean temperature.
climate._comment_wind_base_strength: Base zonal wind speed (m/s) used for three-cell circulation model.
climate._comment_wind_gradP: Scaling factor for pressure-gradient wind contribution.
climate._comment_wind_max: Maximum allowed wind speed (m/s). Values above this are clamped.
climate._comment_wind_damping: Fractional wind speed decay per second (surface friction).
climate._comment_dust_dep: Fraction of suspended dust deposited per second in calm conditions.
climate._comment_dust_lift: Dust lifting rate (per m/s above threshold, per second).
climate._comment_dust_thresh: Minimum wind speed (m/s) required to lift dust.
climate._comment_storm_dust: Minimum dust concentration for storm birth candidate.
climate._comment_storm_wind: Minimum wind speed (m/s) for storm birth candidate.
climate._comment_vis_k: Visibility decay constant: visibility = exp(-dust * k).
climate._comment_freeze: Temperature (K) below which humidity converts to ice.
climate._comment_melt: Temperature (K) above which ice converts back to humidity.

geo._comment_scree: Expected scree events per real-time hour across the whole planet.
geo._comment_rift: Rifts are rare. One every ~20 real-time hours expected globally.

events._comment_rate_minor: Maximum minor geo-events per simulated hour globally.
events._comment_rate_major: Maximum major (destructive) geo-events per simulated hour.
events._comment_min_dist: Events closer than this to the player are suppressed (0 = no minimum).
events._comment_max_dist: Events farther than this from the player are suppressed.
events._comment_cooldown: Per-tile cooldown in game minutes after an event fires.

fault._comment_length: Default fault crack length in simulation units.
fault._comment_width: Carve radius of each capsule segment.
fault._comment_depth: How far radially into the rock the crack penetrates.

landslide._comment_volume: Carve radius at the slide source (proxy for volume).
landslide._comment_runout: Distance from source to deposit centre in simulation units.

collapse._comment_radius: Radius of the underground void chamber.
collapse._comment_depth: Depth below surface of the collapse chamber.

event._comment_pre: Duration of the PRE (precursor) phase in game seconds.
event._comment_post: Duration of the POST (aftermath) phase in game seconds.

tectonic._comment_stress_rate: Rate at which stress accumulates per second in boundary zones.
tectonic._comment_fracture_rate: Rate at which fracture accumulates from stress per second.
tectonic._comment_field: Equirectangular field resolution (width × height). Coarse is intentional.
tectonic._comment_boundary: Angular distance (radians) within which a point is considered a boundary zone.
tectonic._comment_ridge: Height multiplier for convergent ridges (fraction of HEIGHT_SCALE).
tectonic._comment_rift_amp: Depth multiplier for divergent rift valleys.
tectonic._comment_dev: Dev mode: enable plate/boundary/stress colour overlay (dev only).

character._comment_friction: Surface friction below this value triggers slide state.
character._comment_wind: Wind speed above which crouch_reflex state activates.
character._comment_quake: Quake impulse magnitude (normalised) above which brace state activates.

char._comment_mass: Character mass (kg equivalent). Affects wind/impulse response.
char._comment_gravity: Surface gravity (m/s^2 equivalent). Should match planet.gravity.
char._comment_wind_drag: Wind force multiplier on character (higher = more push).
char._comment_max_slope: Maximum walkable slope in degrees; above this triggers Sliding.
char._comment_slide_friction: Friction coefficient while in Sliding state.
char._comment_ice_friction: Multiplier on base friction when surface is fully icy (0=glass).
char._comment_dust_slip: Fraction by which deep dust reduces friction.
char._comment_stumble_shock: Minimum GeoEventSignal intensity to trigger Stumbling.

seed._comment: Default world seed. Any integer is valid. Determines all procedural generation.

time._comment_scale: Game-seconds per real-second (WorldClock.time_scale). 1 = real-time. Dev only.
time._comment_clamp: Maximum real-time dt per frame (seconds). Prevents spiral-of-death on stalled frames.

sched._comment_insol_hz: Update rate for InsolationField in Hz (calls per game-second). Range: 2–5.
sched._comment_climate_dt: Fixed time-step for ClimateSystem (game-seconds per step). Range: 0.5–2.0.
sched._comment_geo_tick: Fixed interval between TectonicPlatesSystem stress updates (game-seconds). Range: 2–10.
sched._comment_geoevent_tick: Fixed interval between GeoEventSystem risk ticks (game-seconds). Range: 5–20.
sched._comment_near_radius: Radius (simulation units) around the player treated as near-field for temporal LOD.
sched._comment_far_div: Far-field regions are refreshed every N climate ticks (1 = same as near-field).
sched._comment_job_ms: Wall-time budget per frame for the BudgetedJobQueue (milliseconds).
sched._comment_job_max: Maximum number of queued jobs processed per frame.

lod._comment_min: Minimum quadtree depth (0 = whole face as one tile).
lod._comment_max: Maximum quadtree depth. Each level halves the tile angular size.
lod._comment_res: NxN vertices per tile. Must be 2^k+1 (e.g. 9, 17, 33).
lod._comment_active: Hard cap on simultaneously active leaf tiles across all faces.
lod._comment_jobs: Max tile meshes built per game frame (controls stutter budget).
lod._comment_debug: When true, logs active tile count and job-queue depth each frame.

insolation._comment_width: Equirectangular grid width (longitude axis). 64 is adequate for climate; use 512 for high-fidelity renders.
insolation._comment_height: Equirectangular grid height (latitude axis). Recommended aspect ratio 2:1.
insolation._comment_cpt: Cells updated per update() call. null = auto (field_width*field_height / 10). Tune to stay within frame budget.
insolation._comment_interval: Target interval (game seconds) between full-field passes. Informational only; actual rate depends on cells_per_tick and call frequency.

atmo._comment_haze_density: Base exponential haze density (Beer-Lambert). Higher = thicker haze at all distances.
atmo._comment_haze_height: Height decay rate for haze density (per simulation unit altitude).
atmo._comment_mie_g: Henyey-Greenstein anisotropy factor. 0=isotropic, closer to 1=stronger forward lobe.
atmo._comment_vol_steps: Volumetric dust ray-march step count. Range: 8–24.
atmo._comment_vol_max_dist: Maximum ray-march distance for volumetric dust (simulation units).
atmo._comment_vol_density: Global multiplier on sampled dust density in the volumetric pass.
atmo._comment_whiteout: Dust level [0-1] above which transmittance collapses toward white (storm whiteout).
atmo._comment_sun2_limit: Maximum fraction of Sun1's sky contribution that Sun2 can add (prevents washed-out sky).

grade._comment_filmic_toe: Filmic curve toe breakpoint. Values below this pass through linearly.
grade._comment_filmic_shoulder: Filmic curve shoulder breakpoint. Values above this are compressed toward white.
grade._comment_shadow_tint: RGB tint applied to dark (shadow) tones for cool-shadow split-toning.
grade._comment_highlight_tint: RGB tint applied to bright (highlight) tones for warm-highlight split-toning.
grade._comment_sat_far: Maximum desaturation applied to far pixels (fog_factor=1). 0=no desat, 1=full greyscale.

sdf._comment_lod: LOD level of surface tiles used as SDF chunk anchors. Higher = finer tiles = more chunks near player.
sdf._comment_resolution: Voxels per side per SDF chunk (e.g. 16 = 16x16x16). Must be even.
sdf._comment_voxel_depth: Radial metres per voxel. Controls vertical detail and chunk depth.
sdf._comment_depth_min: Minimum depth_index to stream (0 = surface-straddling layer).
sdf._comment_depth_max: Maximum depth_index to stream. Increase to stream deeper underground layers.
sdf._comment_cache: Maximum number of SDF chunks kept in memory simultaneously.
sdf._comment_dev_carve: Dev mode: carve a test cavity near spawn on startup (for development only).
sdf._comment_dev_carve_r: Radius of the dev-mode test carve sphere (simulation units).

env._comment_wind_lean_max: Wind speed (m/s) at which upper-body lean reaches maximum.
env._comment_headwind_speed_k: Fraction of speed lost per m/s of headwind.
env._comment_whiteout_turn_k: Multiplier applied to turn_responsiveness at full whiteout.
env._comment_whiteout_stride_scale: Minimum stride scale at full whiteout visibility.
env._comment_ice_friction_min: Effective-friction scale at maximum ice coverage.
env._comment_dust_viscosity_k: Fraction by which deep dust reduces speed.
env._comment_slope_speed_k: Speed scale reduction per radian of slope angle.
env._comment_stability_balance_k: Balance-loss scale increase when ground_stability is 0.
env._comment_variation_window: RNG bucket size (seconds) — micro-variations change at most once per window.
env._comment_variation_strength: Max fractional micro-variation added to stride/cadence.

reflex._comment_recovery: Balance recovery speed per second while grounded, slow, and braced/crouched.
reflex._comment_wind_k: Multiplier converting wind speed to per-second balance loss.
reflex._comment_shock_k: Multiplier converting geo-event shock intensity to balance loss.
reflex._comment_slope_k: Multiplier converting slope angle (radians) to per-second balance loss.
reflex._comment_fall: Balance level at or below which ControlledFall is triggered.
reflex._comment_gust: Tangential wind speed (m/s) above which CrouchInGust reflex activates.
reflex._comment_brace_slope: Slope angle (radians, ~26 deg) above which Brace reflex activates.
reflex._comment_brace_reach: Maximum arm reach for brace-contact probe (simulation units).
reflex._comment_brace_dur: Minimum time (seconds) Brace stance is held after activation.
reflex._comment_grab_speed: Maximum speed (m/s) at which GrabLedge reflex can trigger.
reflex._comment_grab_hold: Time (seconds) character can hang from a ledge before releasing.
reflex._comment_stumble_boost: Velocity boost (m/s) applied per second during StumbleStep reflex.
reflex._comment_slip_recover: Per-second fractional velocity reduction during SlipRecover reflex.
reflex._comment_slip_max: Maximum slope angle (radians, ~37 deg) for SlipRecover; steeper = unrecoverable.
reflex._comment_ledge_step: Distance ahead (simulation units) used for ledge probe.
reflex._comment_ledge_thresh: Minimum height drop (simulation units) to classify as a ledge.
reflex._comment_dev_vis: Dev mode: log reflex state and probe rays each tick (no UI).
